name: Krishna Pinnamaneni
summary: Krishna Pinnamaneni is a PayPal engineering leader, independent app developer, author of 12 technical books, browser-tool builder, and board/advisory candidate for AI, commerce, privacy, local-first software, and product strategy.

Board and advisory judgment for AI, commerce, privacy, developer tools, and product strategy
